description: Attaches Anthropic cache_control: ephemeral markers to a fixed prompt and the last user message to enable prompt caching upstream.

functions.name: Prompt Cache
functions.description: Ensures a fixed-prompt message is present with cache_control, and marks the last user message as a cache breakpoint. Operates on Anthropic-format /v1/messages requests only — OpenAI-format chat completions are not supported because the OpenAI translator (src/providers/openai/messages.ts) drops cache_control from the wire payload, and the OpenAI upstream uses a different caching mechanism (prompt_cache_key) that requires a stable identifier across requests.

fixedPrompt.description: The fixed prompt to ensure is present in the conversation. Required, must be a non-empty string.

applyToRole.description: Role of the message that will carry the fixed prompt. Defaults to 'system'. Recommend 'system' to avoid the fixed-prompt message and the last-user breakpoint being applied to the same message.

createIfMissing.description: If true and no message with the chosen role exists, the plugin creates one. If false, bails out without modifying the request.

addBreakpointToLastUser.description: If true, attaches a cache_control ephemeral breakpoint to the last text block of the last user message.
